emails.subject: Re: CAISO deal #535370
emails.body: Re: CAISO deal #535370 Bob's out of the office now, but I'll check with him in the morning. This very well could be the correct delivery point, but thanks for checking. I'll get back to you. Kate Kimberly Hundl@ENRON 03/01/2001 03:21 PM

emails.body: CAISO deal #535370 Hi Kate! This deal has a strange delivery point -ZP-26. Is that right? It might be, but it's just strange, so I thought I'd ask. Thanks! Kim
